headline: Health Care and Financials lead a resilient market expansion as defensive and specialized sub-sectors show strong upward momentum.
breadth_commentary: Overall market health remains robust with 1,133 constituents in expansion compared to 432 in drawdown. Health Care leads the sector breadth with a 20.0% bullish expansion rate and a high conviction score of 74.29%, followed closely by Financials and Real Estate which show 12.0% and 12.8% bullish expansion rates respectively.
sector_leadership: Leadership is concentrated in specialized niches, with Stockbroking & Allied showing a top sub-sector conviction score of 82.2% led by Motilal Oswal, alongside strong momentum in Microfinance Institutions and Telecom Infrastructure. Theme conviction is also highly visible in Cables - Electricals and Private Sector Banks, driven by strong momentum and expansion metrics.
sector_laggards: Real Estate Development and Iron & Steel are experiencing notable weakness, posting negative 4-week momentum of -13.59% and -8.53% respectively, while Oil Exploration & Production also continues to rotate out.
notable_setups: In the PM focus list, JINDALSAW.NS and SANSERA.NS stand out with explosive momentum profiles. Meanwhile, SETL.NS and AETHER.NS are showing significant positive displacement near their 52-week ceilings, while NDRAUTO.NS and ORIENTHOT.NS are emerging as high-scoring new campaigns in the drawdown recovery tracker.
levels_to_watch: On the downside, structural breaks below 52-week floors have been confirmed for MWL.NS, JAYTEX.BO, and CMSINFO.NS, signaling critical support failures in those names.
